title: ForceJava21
description: A somehow stupid and cursed mod that forces you to launch 1.16.5 with Java 21 and Forge 36.2.41 +.
body:
## ForceJava21

A somehow stupid and cursed mod that forces you to launch Minecraft with Java 21 (and, if you are on 1.16.5, Forge 36.2.41 + is required).

If you are trying to launch Minecraft with Java 20 or below, the following texts will appear in your log, and the game will stop immediately.
```
Please use Java 21 (and Forge 36.2.41+) to launch Minecraft.
Current Java version:  yourJavaVersion. Current Forge version:  yourForgeVersion
Recommendations: 
Zulu: https://www.azul.com/downloads/?version=java-21-lts&package=jdk#zulu
Oracle: https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#java21
Temurin: https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=21
```

## But... how can you launch 1.16.5 forge with Java 21?
You can. For details, see [#9825](https://github.com/MinecraftForge/MinecraftForge/pull/9825).
